\tzpentry{ID3610}{Lemniscate Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3610 introduces Lemniscate Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ V(\phi) = \frac{\lambda}{4}(\phi^2 - v^2)^2 + V_{\text{lemniscate}}(r,\theta) + \sum_{n=1}^{153{,}600} \delta\bigl(r - r_n\bigr)\,\Phi_{\text{nodal}}, \]
